name: CYABRA, INC.
summary: Trailblazer Holdings, Inc. (to be renamed Cyabra, Inc.) is a Delaware corporation formed solely to execute a business combination with Cyabra Strategy Ltd., a private Israeli company. Currently a shell with no assets, operations, or liabilities, it is pursuing a merger that will make Cyabra a wholly owned subsidiary. The combined company will be publicly traded as Cyabra, Inc. (CYAB), funded in part by $8 million in PIPE investments in Series B Preferred Stock.
